examples: In the early 1940s, basking in the glory of chemical-based intensive agriculture, the farmers avidly took to pesticides as a sure measure to boost crop yield.
Thank you for a most entertaining magazine, which I read avidly each month.
That the manga was avidly read by members of the Self-Defense Forces only reinforced that impression.
What the reporter didn't know was how avidly the sisters, generally speaking, disliked his gender.
